LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.description: Brahmin serve a vital environmental niche in the wasteland, they form the foundation of survival for many species. Forming the backbone of the New Californian economy; brahmin can carry large loads for a far greater distance than other creatures. Brahmin droppings are great fertilizer and fuel for campfires; the fumes from their feces are also used to synthesize jet; while their hide and hair can be used to make tents, leather clothing, saddle bags, or a bizarre brahmin-looking disguise.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.label: Brahmin
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.tools.1.label: headbutt
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.tools.2.label: left hoof
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.tools.3.label: right hoof
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Large.description: A massive, heavily reinforced cage designed to contain the largest and most dangerous wasteland predators. Originally designed for pre-war zoos and research facilities, these cages feature reinforced steel construction and advanced containment systems. Only the most skilled engineers can properly construct these formidable enclosures.
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Large.label: large animal cage
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Medium.description: A reinforced cage capable of holding medium-sized wasteland creatures. Built with thicker steel bars and improved locking mechanisms, this cage can safely contain animals that would easily escape from smaller enclosures. Popular among wasteland traders who deal in exotic mutated pets and working animals.
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Medium.label: medium animal cage
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Small.description: A sturdy metal cage designed to safely capture and contain small wasteland creatures. Originally used by pre-war researchers and hunters, these cages have proven invaluable for wastelanders looking to domesticate the various mutated animals roaming the post-nuclear landscape. Requires regular feeding to maintain captured animals.
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Small.label: small animal cage
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Mysterious_Stranger_Hat.desc: A distinctive hat worn by the mysterious stranger, providing a subtle boost to accuracy.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Pipboy3000_Mark_IV.descripti: An advanced iteration of the Pip-Boy 3000, the Mark IV features enhanced processing power and a more refined interface. Its improved data management systems provide better work coordination and faster information processing. The Mark IV was considered top-of-the-line before the war. This model offers superior performance compared to earlier versions, with enhanced computational capabilities.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Pipboy3000_Mark_IV.label: Pip-Boy 3000 Mark IV
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Pipboy3000_Mk_I.description: The Pip-Boy 3000 model was the most common personal information processor issued to Vault dwellers before the war. This rugged wrist-mounted computer features a monochrome green display and provides essential data management capabilities. Its simple but reliable interface assists with work coordination and task management. This is the classic model known for its durability and ease of use.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Pipboy3000_Mk_I.label: Pip-Boy 3000
LanguageData.FCP_Beam_Gatling_Laser.label: gatling laser beam
LanguageData.FCP_Beam_Laser.label: laser beam
LanguageData.FCP_Beam_Laser_S.label: focused laser beam
LanguageData.FCP_Beam_MF_Breeder.label: breeder beam
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_10mm.label: 10mm Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_127mm.label: 12.7mm Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_12Gauge_Pellet.label: 12 Gauge Pellet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_14mm.description: A powerful 14mm round for high-caliber pistols.
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_14mm.label: 14mm bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_20Gauge_Pellet.label: 20 Gauge Pellet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_223mm.label: .223 Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_22LR.label: .22 LR Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_308mm.label: .308 Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_32mm.label: .32 Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_357mm.label: 357mm Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_44Magnum.label: .44 Magnum Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_4570mm.label: .45-70 Government Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_45ACP.label: .45 ACP Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_50AE.description: A massive .50 Action Express round for the most powerful handguns.
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_50AE.label: .50 AE bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_556mm.label: 556mm Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_5mm.label: 5mm Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_9mm.label: 9mm Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_AMR.label: AMR Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_BB.label: BB Pellet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Gauss.label: 2mm EC Round
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Laser.label: Laser Shot
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Laser_S.label: Laser Shot
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_MF_Breeder.label: Laser Shot
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Nail.label: Nail
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Plasma.label: Plasma Cast
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Ranger_Sequoia.label: Ranger Sequoia Bullet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Ultracite.label: Ultracite Shot
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_Caps.description: An old Nuka Cola bottle cap. What used to be garbage is now the most commonly used currency in the wastes today.
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_Caps.label: Caps
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Common.descript: A Vault-Tec collectors trading card. This is just a common one, but maybe it'll be worth something to someone.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Common.label: A common collectable trading card
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Legendary.descr: A Vault-Tec collectors trading card and this is a legendary one! This is a one of a kind piece, im sure its worth more than a few caps!
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Legendary.label: A legendary collectable trading card
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Rare.descriptio: A Vault-Tec collectors trading card, this is a Rare one. Not the most valuable, but still an amazing find!
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Rare.label: A rare collectable trading card
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Edition_Lunchbox_Dir: A Vault-Tec collectors edition lunchbox. It's a little dirty, but still opens and may have something useful inside!
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Edition_Lunchbox_Min: A Vault-Tec collectors edition lunchbox. It's in Mint Condition, there's probably something valuable inside!
Mint Condition Vault-Tec Collectors Edition Lunchbox
LanguageData.FCP_Power_Armor_VR_Pod.description: A virtual reality pod designed for power armor training simulations, enhancing the user's combat skills and proficiency with power armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Power_Armor_VR_Pod.label: Power Armor Simulation VR Pod
LanguageData.FCP_Pre_War_Army_Truck.description: An old, destroyed military truck. Used by the great nations before the bombs droped.
LanguageData.FCP_Pre_War_Army_Truck.label: Pre-War US Army Truck
LanguageData.FCP_Pre_War_Army_Vertibird.description: An old, destroyed military Vertibid. Used by the great nations before the bombs droped.
LanguageData.FCP_Pre_War_Army_Vertibird.label: Pre-War US Army Vertibird
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Ammo_Press.label: ammo press
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Armor_Workbench.label: armor workbench
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Chemistry_Workbench.label: chemistry workbench
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Complex_Weapons_Workbench: A workbench for making complex weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Cooking_Station_Fueled_Co: A cooking station fueled with wood.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Cooking_Station_Fueled_Si: A cooking station fueled with wood.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Fabrication_Workbench.des: A workbench equipped with advanced tools for producing technological marvels from simpler materials.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Portable_Tool_Bench.label: portable tool bench
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Tailoring_Workbench.descr: A workbench for tailoring clothes by hand. Works at 50% of the speed of an electric tailoring bench.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Tailoring_Workbench.label: tailoring workbench
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Tool_Bench.label: tool bench
LanguageData.FCP_VATS_Zoomer.label: vats
LanguageData.FCP_Vertibird.description: Vertibird is a designation for a series of vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) aircraft. These multipurpose tiltrotor aircraft were developed by the United States military and rapidly became a primary gunship and transport aircraft.
LanguageData.FCP_Vertibird.label: vertibird
LanguageData.FCP_VertibirdIncoming.label: vertibird (incoming)
LanguageData.FCP_VertibirdLeaving.label: vertibird (leaving)
LanguageData.FCP_Wall_Bunker.description: A heavy reinforced concrete wall designed for military bunkers. Extremely durable and provides excellent protection. These walls were commonly used in pre-war military installations.
LanguageData.FCP_Wall_Bunker.label: bunker wall
LanguageData.MinePocket.label: mine pocket
LanguageData.MinePocket.verbs.0.label: place mine
LanguageData.MinePocket_Charge.label: mine charge
LanguageData.MinePocket_Mine.label: mine
LanguageData.Projectile_MinePocket.label: flying mine
